266 I0100_CNCR_CD I0100_CNCR_CD I0100 Active Diagnoses: Cancer Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a diagnosis of cancer (with or without metastasis) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
